com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry

Class ExtPINEntryParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.ExtPINEntryParameters
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExtendedExtPINEntryParams, ExtOfflinePINParameters, ExtOnlinePINParameters

    public class ExtPINEntryParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Parameters for online PIN input.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExtPINEntryParameters() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String[] getDisplayMessages()
      Gets display messages.
      ExtPINMaskLine getMaskLine()
      Gets mask line.
      byte getMaxPINLen()
      Gets maximum length of PIN input.
      PINBlockMode getPINBlockMode()
      Gets PIN block mode.
      byte[] getPinLengthRange()
      Gets pin length range.
      Alignment getPinMaskAlignment()
      Gets pin mask alignment.
      boolean isAutoComplete()
      Whether or not Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.
      void setAutoComplete(boolean autoComplete)
      Sets whether or not Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.
      void setDisplayMessages(java.lang.String[] displayMessages)
      Sets display messages.
      void setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine maskLine)
      Sets mask line.
      void setMaxPINLen(byte maxPinLen)
      Sets maximum length of PIN input.
      void setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode pinBlockMode)
      Sets PIN block mode.
      void setPinLengthRange(byte[] pinLengthRange)
      Sets pin length range, the range between 4 and maxPINLen will be valid in PIN entry process.
      void setPinMaskAlignment(Alignment pinMaskAlignment)
      Sets pin mask alignment.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExtPINEntryParameters

        public ExtPINEntryParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getMaxPINLen

        public byte getMaxPINLen()
        Gets maximum length of PIN input. The minimum length is 4.
        Returns:
        Maximum length of PIN input. Value range: [0x04-0x0C].

      • setMaxPINLen

        public void setMaxPINLen(byte maxPinLen)
        Sets maximum length of PIN input. The minimum length is 4.
        Parameters:
        maxPinLen - Maximum length of PIN input. Value range: [0x04-0x0C].

      • isAutoComplete

        public boolean isAutoComplete()
        Whether or not Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.
        Returns:
        Auto completing flag.
        • 'true': No need to press Enter key to complete PIN entry. It will end PIN entry automatically when the entered PIN length reaches the maximum length.
        • 'false': Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.

      • setAutoComplete

        public void setAutoComplete(boolean autoComplete)
        Sets whether or not Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.
        Parameters:
        autoComplete - Auto completing flag.
        • 'true': No need to press Enter key to complete PIN entry. It will end PIN entry automatically when the entered PIN length reaches the maximum length.
        • 'false': Enter key is needed to complete PIN entry.

      • getPINBlockMode

        public PINBlockMode getPINBlockMode()
        Gets PIN block mode.
        Returns:
        PIN block mode. Following modes supported:
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_1
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_3
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_4

      • setPINBlockMode

        public void setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode pinBlockMode)
        Sets PIN block mode.
        Parameters:
        pinBlockMode - PIN block mode. Following modes supported:
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_1
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_3
        • PINBlockMode.ISO9564_4

      • getDisplayMessages

        public java.lang.String[] getDisplayMessages()
        Gets display messages.
        Returns:
        Messages that will displayed in order on each line. If the message is null or empty, nothing will be displayed on the corresponding line.

      • setDisplayMessages

        public void setDisplayMessages(java.lang.String[] displayMessages)
        Sets display messages.
        Parameters:
        displayMessages - Messages that will displayed in order on each line. If the message is null or empty, nothing will be displayed on the corresponding line.

      • getMaskLine

        public ExtPINMaskLine getMaskLine()
        Gets mask line.
        Returns:
        Mask line, indicates which line to display input PIN in asterisks. See ExtPINMaskLine, default value is ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_5

      • setMaskLine

        public void setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine maskLine)
        Sets mask line.
        Parameters:
        maskLine - Mask line, indicates which line to display input PIN in asterisks. See ExtPINMaskLine, default value is ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_5

      • getPinLengthRange

        public byte[] getPinLengthRange()
        Gets pin length range.
        Returns:
        Pin length range, the range between 4 and maxPINLen will be valid in PIN entry process.

      • setPinLengthRange

        public void setPinLengthRange(byte[] pinLengthRange)
        Sets pin length range, the range between 4 and maxPINLen will be valid in PIN entry process.
        Parameters:
        pinLengthRange - PIN length range, the range between 4 and maxPINLen will be valid in PIN entry process.

      • getPinMaskAlignment

        public Alignment getPinMaskAlignment()
        Gets pin mask alignment.
        Returns:
        Pin mask alignment, indicates which position to display the pin mask. See Alignment, default value is Alignment.Left.

      • setPinMaskAlignment

        public void setPinMaskAlignment(Alignment pinMaskAlignment)
        Sets pin mask alignment.
        Parameters:
        pinMaskAlignment - Pin mask alignment, indicates which position to display the pin mask. See Alignment, default value is Alignment.Left.
